creator: neuf@lrs.e-technik.uni-erlangen.de
text:
RELNOTES.TXT says about SysKonnect SK-984x PCI Gigabit Ethernet cards:  

SK-9842 1000baseSX multimode fiber, single port
SK-9843 1000baseLX single mode fiber, dual port

According to information of the manufacturer (www.syskonnect.com) the correct 
description is:

SK-9842 1000baseLX single mode fiber, dual port
SK-9843 1000baseSX multimode fiber, single port
